name: Animal Friendship
description: This spell lets you convince a beast that you mean it no harm. Choose a beast that you can see within range. It must see and hear you. If the beast's Intelligence is 4 or higher, the spell fails.
effect: The targeted beast regards you as a friendly creature for 24 hours (Wisdom save negates). If you or allies harm the beast the effect ends immediately.
notes: Fails automatically if the target has Intelligence 4 or higher — only works on true beasts.
The charm effect ends immediately if the caster or any ally harms the beast.

material_component.focus_provided: Sprig of Mistletoe provides unlimited pollen
